email.body:
Hi Lorena,

Effective L&D isn't just about delivering training — from my experience, it's about understanding how people actually learn on the job and building systems that close real performance gaps.

I'm reaching out because I recently applied for the L&D Specialist role at Talkiatry, and the work your team does building clinical and corporate learning programs stood out to me. With a background in HR, Organizational Development, and Program Management, I've designed and facilitated programs that reached a 78% enrollment and adoption rate, and have worked directly with C-suite leaders to prioritize L&D strategy at NextGen Healthcare.

I'd welcome a brief conversation — I have some time in the next two weeks if you're free.

Sincerely,
Jamie (Yi-Chieh) Cheng
